scripts.mcp:check: pnpm --filter @gitcaster/mcp check && node scripts/mcp/check-mcp-beta-tools.cjs && node scripts/mcp/check-pr11-mcp-tools.cjs
scripts.node-api:check: pnpm --filter @gitcaster/protocol build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/identity build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/capabilities build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/security build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/repo-records build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/object-store build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/ref-consensus build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/node check && node scripts/node/check-local-node-api-source.cjs
scripts.repo-records:check: pnpm --filter @gitcaster/protocol build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/identity build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/capabilities build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/security build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/repo-records build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/repo-records test && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/node build && node scripts/repo-records/check-repo-records-public-alpha.cjs
scripts.push-local-object-store:check: pnpm --filter @gitcaster/protocol build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/identity build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/capabilities build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/security build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/repo-records build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/object-store build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/object-store test && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/ref-consensus build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/node build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/cli build && node scripts/push-local/check-push-local-object-store-public-alpha.cjs
scripts.ref-consensus:check: pnpm --filter @gitcaster/protocol build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/identity build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/capabilities build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/security build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/object-store build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/repo-records build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/ref-consensus build && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/ref-consensus test && pnpm --filter @gitcaster/node build && node scripts/refs/check-ref-consensus-public-alpha.cjs
